canonical_summary: Personal AgentOS build. Extending ameen-context MCP with session memory tools + Claude Code hooks so every session auto-loads relevant project context and auto-saves findings.

known_solutions.problem: Memory Vault repo design only activates inside its own directory — not a global layer.
known_solutions.solution: Extend ameen-context MCP (already global via ~/.claude.json) with session memory tools, and wire SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json for auto-load + auto-save.

known_solutions.problem: Auto mode classifier blocks programmatic modification of ~/.claude/settings.json to register SessionStart/SessionEnd hooks
known_solutions.solution: Edit tool call blocked by auto mode classifier (self-modification guardrail)

known_solutions.problem: How to efficiently score and filter RFP eligibility across multiple criteria
known_solutions.solution: Two-tier approach recommended as the scoring architecture for RFP eligibility in rfp_intelligence_pro

known_solutions.problem: How to score RFP eligibility across multiple criteria for grant opportunities
known_solutions.solution: No new confirmed results this session — prior context loaded via SessionStart hook

known_solutions.problem: No substantive user interaction occurred this session to make progress on open threads
known_solutions.solution: SessionStart hook loaded prior AgentOS context successfully

known_solutions.problem: 15 historical session transcript files across different project directories needed to be backfilled into the structured memory system
known_solutions.solution: Confirmed JSONL entries contain a `cwd` field enabling reliable project classification without LLM inference

known_solutions.problem: v3 QA identified 9 issues across the slide deck and facilitator documents
known_solutions.solution: 8 of 9 QA issues resolved in v3

known_solutions.problem: User was uncertain whether their MCP server(s) were connected
known_solutions.solution: Confirmed multiple MCP servers are connected, including computer-use (desktop control/screenshots)

known_solutions.problem: ameen-context MCP server not registered in Claude Code after being built and pushed to GitHub
known_solutions.solution: settings.json does not support mcpServers as a top-level field

known_solutions.problem: ameen-context MCP server does not appear in `claude mcp list` output
known_solutions.solution: `claude mcp list` returned only one server: plugin:github:github (HTTP, failed to connect)

decision_log.decision: Build session memory as an extension of ameen-context, not as a separate memory-vault repo.
v1 classification is keyword + cwd path matching. LLM-based classification deferred to v2.
v1 SessionEnd hook does best-effort raw capture and queues for v2 LLM structuring. Model can also call context_save_session directly mid-session for high-quality saves.
Use install_hooks.sh as the delivery mechanism for hook registration since direct agent modification is blocked
Use two-tier scoring model with hard gates before weighted scoring
Use two-tier scoring model with hard gates before weighted scoring for RFP eligibility
Use cwd field from JSONL entries as primary signal for project classification
Update registry.json to include DHS Consulting and IDeaS-Lab project paths
Build backfill script to process 15 historical sessions through the v2 structuring pipeline
Do not edit the PPTX file — only read it with python-pptx and apply changes to facilitator markdown docs
Use `claude mcp add <name> -s user <interpreter> <script>` for global MCP registration
MCP server config does not go in settings.json
